creator: yokota@res.otaru-uc.ac.jp
text:
Title should be modified to: [PATCH] print/lyx15: update to 1.5.4 (bug
of porttools?)

If devel/icu has been updated recently from ports, qt4-corelib needs to
be recompiled for lyx15 to be successful in building. lyx15 has been
marked broken probably because of this problem.
